news.title: Switch 2 is the second fastest-selling console in US history, as PlayStation records its worst May in decades - and Xbox its worst May ever
news.titleEN: Switch 2 is the second fastest-selling console in US history, as PlayStation records its worst May in decades - and Xbox its worst May ever

news.title: OldSchool RuneScape shows up in Phoebe Bridger's Lost Boys music video
news.titleEN: OldSchool RuneScape shows up in Phoebe Bridger's Lost Boys music video

news.title: The Steam Machine knock-offs begin as Stim Machine attempts to offer a more powerful machine at the same price and shape
news.titleEN: The Steam Machine knock-offs begin as Stim Machine attempts to offer a more powerful machine at the same price and shape
news.desc: The launch of the Steam Machine has officially given us the first attempt at a knock-off. The cheekily-named Stim Machine comes from a French hardware retailer, and it's taking an aim at Valve's mini-PC in a few key ways. Read more
news.descEN: The launch of the Steam Machine has officially given us the first attempt at a knock-off. The cheekily-named Stim Machine comes from a French hardware retailer, and it's taking an aim at Valve's mini-PC in a few key ways. Read more

news.title: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?
news.titleEN: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?
news.desc: Grand Theft Auto 6 apparently features a new in-game social network where we'll be able to watch videos and follow influences to discover "secret" side missions, which makes it sound like Rockstar is aiming its satirical cannon at TikTok and Instagra
news.descEN: Grand Theft Auto 6 apparently features a new in-game social network where we'll be able to watch videos and follow influences to discover "secret" side missions, which makes it sound like Rockstar is aiming its satirical cannon at TikTok and Instagra

news.title: Battlefield 6 is altering its long-range gunplay to feel more like Battlefield 4
news.titleEN: Battlefield 6 is altering its long-range gunplay to feel more like Battlefield 4
news.desc: As promised, Battlefield Studios has detailed how the gunplay of Battlefield 6 is being overhauled, and it turns out the developer wants it to feel closer to Battlefield 4. The proposed changes will arrive 30th June with the final update for Season 3
news.descEN: As promised, Battlefield Studios has detailed how the gunplay of Battlefield 6 is being overhauled, and it turns out the developer wants it to feel closer to Battlefield 4. The proposed changes will arrive 30th June with the final update for Season 3

news.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 demand may be so high it will "likely outstrip supply" this holiday season, a video game retailer warns
news.titleEN: Grand Theft Auto 6 demand may be so high it will "likely outstrip supply" this holiday season, a video game retailer warns
news.desc: Major retailers may not have the stock of consoles necessary to bear the incoming wave of demand this holiday season, thanks to Grand Theft Auto 6's release, it's claimed. Read more
news.descEN: Major retailers may not have the stock of consoles necessary to bear the incoming wave of demand this holiday season, thanks to Grand Theft Auto 6's release, it's claimed. Read more

news.title: Xbox Series X/S is getting a major price increase, as Microsoft becomes the latest company to blame skyrocketing RAM and storage costs
news.titleEN: Xbox Series X/S is getting a major price increase, as Microsoft becomes the latest company to blame skyrocketing RAM and storage costs
news.desc: Microsoft has announced significant price increases of $100 USD and beyond for its Xbox Series X/S consoles, blaming the rising costs of memory and storage for the move. Read more
news.descEN: Microsoft has announced significant price increases of $100 USD and beyond for its Xbox Series X/S consoles, blaming the rising costs of memory and storage for the move. Read more

news.title: Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc in the box, Insomniac assures players as GTA 6's download code approach sends ripples around the industry
news.titleEN: Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc in the box, Insomniac assures players as GTA 6's download code approach sends ripples around the industry
news.desc: Insomniac Games has assured fans not to worry: unlike the impending GTA 6, the physical edition of Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc when it releases exclusively on PlayStation 5 on 15th September. Read more
news.descEN: Insomniac Games has assured fans not to worry: unlike the impending GTA 6, the physical edition of Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc when it releases exclusively on PlayStation 5 on 15th September. Read more

news.title: A proper physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 will arrive before the year's end, insider claims
news.titleEN: A proper physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 will arrive before the year's end, insider claims
news.desc: The same insider who claimed in February that Grand Theft Auto 6 wouldn't launch with a physical version - which turned out to be almost correct - has now claimed a proper physical edition with a disc will launch in December. Read more
news.descEN: The same insider who claimed in February that Grand Theft Auto 6 wouldn't launch with a physical version - which turned out to be almost correct - has now claimed a proper physical edition with a disc will launch in December. Read more

news.title: Online retailers are stating that PS5 GTA 6 codes can only be played in the country they're bought
news.titleEN: Online retailers are stating that PS5 GTA 6 codes can only be played in the country they're bought
news.desc: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders have officially gone live in many parts of the world, and while many players will be placing their pre-orders through the PlayStation and Xbox Stores, many others will order from Amazon and online retailers. Read more
news.descEN: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders have officially gone live in many parts of the world, and while many players will be placing their pre-orders through the PlayStation and Xbox Stores, many others will order from Amazon and online retailers. Read more
